post_study_work_visa.name: OPT (Optional Practical Training)
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Employer sponsorship required for H-1B after OPT. Annual H-1B lottery with ~30% selection rate.

scholarship_availability: High — merit-based and need-based grants common at top programs. Average scholarship covers 25-40% of tuition.
path_to_pr: No direct MBA-to-green-card pathway. Requires employer sponsorship (EB-2/EB-3). Typical timeline: 3-10+ years depending on country of birth.
test_policy: GMAT or GRE accepted at all schools. Some offer test waivers for experienced candidates.
